name: Black Forest Pie
recipeInstructions: 1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate with the sweetened condensed milk over medium-low heat. Remove from heat and stir in the almond extract. Pour into a large bowl and cool or chill thoroughly. Beat until smooth. Fold in the whipped cream. Pour into the prepared pastry shell. Chill for 4 hours or until set. Serve with pie filling. Garnish with almonds if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
